query: SELECT executed_at, COUNT(*) as leg_count, GROUP_CONCAT(action ORDER BY action SEPARATOR ' | ') as actions, GROUP_CONCAT(option_type ORDER BY option_type SEPARATOR ',') as opt_types, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT underlying_symbol) as underlying FROM cached_transactions WHERE transaction_type = 'Trade' AND action IN ('Buy to Open','Sell to Open') GROUP BY executed_at HAVING leg_count > 1 AND (opt_types LIKE '%C%' OR leg_count >= 4) ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT executed_at, COUNT(*) as leg_count, GROUP_CONCAT(action ORDER BY action SEPARATOR ' | ') as actions, GROUP_CONCAT(option_type ORDER BY option_type SEPARATOR ',') as opt_types, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT underlying_symbol) as underlying FROM cached_transactions WHERE transaction_type = 'Trade' AND action IN ('Buy to Open','Sell to Open') GROUP BY executed_at HAVING leg_count > 1 AND (opt_types LIKE '%C%' OR leg_count >= 4) ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT 20;
